steps.title: Step 1
steps.content: Items that are blue AND triangular AND plastic must satisfy all three percentages in sequence: 36% of the crate is blue, then 40% of those are triangular, then 45% of those are plastic.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.content: Multiply the three fractions: 0.36 × 0.40 × 0.45 = 0.144 × 0.45 = 0.0648 ≈ 6.48%. About 6.48% of all items are blue triangular plastic.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.content: The question asks for items that are NOT blue triangular plastic: 100% − 6.48% = 93.52%.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.content:
• A: 1.30% — far too small; this would be the result of additional incorrect multiplication.
  • B: 64.80% — does not match any reasonable intermediate.
  • C: 93.52% — matches 100% minus the 6.48% computed above.
  • D: 98.70% — off by an order of magnitude in the product.
C is correct.
